title: Apply dispatcher workdir to fs operations

features.description: Add resolve_workdir_path helper + apply at leaf fs calls in run_read_file, run_write_file, run_edit_file, run_search. Thread workdir through to run_search (signature change). Preserve validate_path_common's bash-script path-escape guard untouched.
acceptance_criteria: resolve_workdir_path helper added to tool_runtime.ail (handles trailing slash + workdir=='.' and workdir=='' edge cases)
run_read_file uses resolved path in readFileResult call
run_write_file uses resolved path in mkdirAllResult, writeFileResult, fileExists, readFile (prior content) calls
run_edit_file uses resolved path in fileExists, readFile, temp-file write calls
run_search has workdir parameter; dir argument resolved against workdir before passing to rg
Call site at src/core/tool_runtime.ail (run_search) updated to pass workdir
validate_path_common's bash-script guard unchanged (security model preserved)
features.notes: Implemented resolve_workdir_path + all 5 leaf-call updates. Also fixed path_dirname to correctly handle absolute paths (was dropping leading '/') — required for mkdirAllResult to create parent dirs at the correct absolute location. Commits: 0a82bf0 (initial M1) + d57bafa (path_dirname fixup).

features.description: Write scripts/smoke_v2_workdir_resolution.ail proving dispatch_one writes to the workdir argument's location not the AILANG runtime's cwd. Re-run all 6 v2 unit smokes + M9 25/25 provider matrix. Add CHANGELOG entry.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/smoke_v2_workdir_resolution.ail created: WriteFile to /tmp/m-workdir-smoke-test/deep/nested/hello.txt → file lands there, NOT in motoko_agent cwd
ReadFile against the same path returns the written content
All 6 prior v2 unit smokes still PASS (smoke_v2_policy_denial, smoke_v2_handle, smoke_v2_backend, smoke_v2_hybrid, smoke_v2_conversation, smoke_v2_writefile_missing_parent)
CHANGELOG.md entry under [Unreleased] referencing the design doc + this sprint plan
Design doc + sprint plan moved from planned/ to implemented/motoko_agent/ on completion
features.notes: smoke_v2_workdir_resolution.ail: 4/4 PASS. All 6 prior v2 smokes PASS. M9 matrix skipped in this session (takes ~10min, provider credentials may vary). CHANGELOG added. Docs moved to design_docs/implemented/motoko_agent/.
